SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AndFilter
to perform "filter intersections", which amounts to applying the logic between filters.
BrandBeginByFilter
an object that allows filtering by the make of a vehicle that begins with a given character
BrandFilter
a BrandFilter allows to select a Vehicle for a given brand
Car
the object car which is a vehicle
Client
represent clients of a rental agency, the names are supposed to be unique then two Client objects with same name are considered equals
FriendlyRentalAgency
the object friendly rental agency
MaxPriceFilter
a MaxPriceFilter allows to select a vehicle if its daily rental price is lower than a given price
MotorBike
the object MotorBike which is a vehicle
RentalAgency
the object for implements our rental agency
RentalAgencyMain
 
SuspiciousRentalAgency
the object Suspicious Rental Agency
UnknownVehicleException
 
Vehicle
A class to model Vehicle defined
VehicleFilter
